# Tech debt tracker

Known shortcuts, deferrals, and rough edges. One row per item. Keep entries short — link to the exec plan that introduced or will resolve the debt.

| Item | Surfaced in | Severity | Owner | Notes |
|------|-------------|----------|-------|-------|
| — | _no tracked debt_ | — | — | — |

## Conventions

- This file is **generated** from `.tech-debt/*.md` frontmatter by `scripts/regen-generated.py`. Add a row by creating a new `.tech-debt/<id>.md`.
- Add an entry whenever an exec plan accepts a known shortcut. Linking back from the plan is required.
- `gc-sweep` may add entries automatically when it detects a deviation it can't safely auto-refactor.
- Resolve an entry by deleting its source file in the same PR that pays the debt; the commit message is the audit trail.
